response.original_title: The Oakwood College 1988 AYS Homecoming Concert
response.overview: A vibrant, spirit‑filled live gospel celebration recorded at the Von Braun Civic Auditorium in Huntsville, Alabama, this 1988 Oakwood College AYS Homecoming Concert brings together some of the most beloved voices in Adventist music. Featuring dynamic performances from The Chamber Singers, Sybil Beaulieu, The Singing Men of White Plains, Divine Touch, Foundation, Impact, Unity, The Lloyd Mallory Singers, and a young Brian McKnight, the concert blends praise, worship, and classic gospel artistry into an unforgettable musical experience.  The program also includes the comedic sketch “Super Pastor,” starring Mark Woodson, Monica Smith, and Chip Wright, adding a lighthearted interlude to the evening’s worship atmosphere. The finale unites the congregation for the OCAYS theme song, Build On The Rock.  Preserved and released by Black In The Day Adventist Productions, this concert stands as a historical snapshot of African‑American Adventist musical heritage.
response.title: The Oakwood College 1988 AYS Homecoming Concert
